live.title: Dempo Sports Club vs Aizawl FC - 11 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Dempo Sports Club host Aizawl FC in an important Indian Football League fixture as both sides look to gather momentum in a competitive phase of the season. Dempo will aim to make home conditions count and control key phases of play, while Aizawl FC arrive focused on organization and resilience as they chase a valuable away result. Tune in to catch all the action from Indian Football League 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
